observations.archetype_gloss: The internal burden and suffocating weight of hoarded grief and unresolved pain
observations.summary: Dan is depicted as physically and psychologically burdened, his form distended and crushed by an accumulated density that silences him, symbolizing his internal struggle with hoarded grief and emotional suffocation.

evidence.quote: He gathered until his form was distended and crushed—a silent column in a barren field, the accumulated density squeezing the breath from his lungs. His hands locked in the posture of hoarding. The suffocating mass silenced him.
